metadata.description: Local SLM fine-tuning for people who are not AI engineers - train on your Mac, keep your data private, publish only when you choose to.

plugins.name: fine-tune-slm
plugins.description: Fine-tune a small language model locally on Apple Silicon via a plain-English interview (MLX + LoRA, Ollama export, HTML dashboard), plus the publish-slm companion skill for sharing a tested model to ollama.com or Hugging Face.
